settings.brand_featured_text:
Bye Bye Brassy, Hello Classy Bleached Hair

Showcase the beauty of ash, light blonde or silver/white hair with our number one colour clarifying purple shampoo and conditioner. The neutralising system, enriched with magnesium and anti-yellowing agents, counteracts unwanted brassy tones.

settings.section-sub-heading: Showcase the beauty of ash, light blonde or silver/white hair with our number one colour clarifying purple shampoo and conditioner. The neutralising system, enriched with magnesium and anti-yellowing agents, counteracts unwanted brassy tones.

settings.description_1:
L'Oréal Serie Expert Silver Shampoo
A clarifying purple shampoo with anti-yellowing agents that counteracts and neutralizes unwanted brassiness to maintain the perfect tone of bleached hair with a boost of shine
settings.description_2:
L'Oréal Serie Expert Silver Conditioner
A lightweight silver neutralising cream treatment that counteracts unwanted brassy tones and gives bleached hair softness and shine. It enhances white, grey and light blonde hair and contrasts yellow undertones
